title: 'unsafe-eval' is not allowed in manifest CSP.
eval() called with user-influenced argument.
evidence: Replace eval() with a static parser or postMessage handler.
fix_recipe: Replace eval() with a static parser or postMessage handler.

title: Broad host_permissions pattern '*://*/*' requested.
evidence: Narrow host_permissions to the origins the extension actually needs, or move to optional_permissions.
fix_recipe: Narrow host_permissions to the origins the extension actually needs, or move to optional_permissions.

title: Vulnerable jquery 1.12.4
evidence: jQuery before 3.0.0 is vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) attacks when a cross-domain Ajax request is performed without the dataType option.

title: Vulnerable jquery 1.12.4
evidence: jQuery before 3.4.0 mishandles jQuery.extend(true, {}, ...) because of Object.prototype pollution.
